introSection: Great Desert-Rally is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. Opened in 2017, it was built by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Great Desert-Rally is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. Opened in 2017, it was built by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions.



2 trains with 12 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
